personalInfo.bio: I'm a passionate developer and computer science student with a strong focus on creating efficient, user-friendly web applications. I specialize in full-stack development and continuously explore new technologies to solve real-world problems.

about.description: I am a dedicated developer with expertise in building modern web applications. My journey in software development began with a curiosity about how things work, which evolved into a passion for creating solutions that make a difference.
